title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Repco Home Finance Limited
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated June 05, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹70,000/- (Rupees Seventy thousand only) on Repco Home Finance Limited (the company) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Fair Practice Code’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of section 52A of the National Housing Bank Act, 1987. The statutory inspection of the company was conducted by National Hous
